name: Fixture file contains valid JSON
requirement: Read and validate lm46-technical-attributes-sanitized.json

name: Fixture contractVersion check
requirement: Fixture has contractVersion key

name: Fixture class check
requirement: Fixture has fixtureClass key

name: Fixture offer count
requirement: Fixture has exactly 9 offers

name: Fixture category count
requirement: Fixture has exactly 6 categories

name: Fixture source-key count
requirement: Fixture has exactly 23 unique keys

name: Fixture technical attribute occurrence count
requirement: Fixture has exactly 27 attribute occurrences

name: Mapping manifest contains valid JSON
requirement: Read and validate lm-cat-filter-46-map-v1.json

name: Mapping manifest has 23 unique records
requirement: Mapping manifest contains exactly 23 records

name: Mapping manifest manual_review counts
requirement: Mapping manifest has 0 mapped and 23 manual_review_required decisions

name: OAV targets provenance column exists
requirement: migration_oav_targets table has target_provenance column

name: OAOV targets provenance column exists
requirement: migration_oaov_targets table has target_provenance column

name: OAV provenance NOT NULL constraint
requirement: target_provenance column is NOT NULL in migration_oav_targets

name: OAOV provenance NOT NULL constraint
requirement: target_provenance column is NOT NULL in migration_oaov_targets

name: OAV provenance check constraint allows created_by_batch
requirement: target_provenance check allows 'created_by_batch' on OAV

name: OAV provenance check constraint allows unknown_legacy
requirement: target_provenance check allows 'unknown_legacy' on OAV

name: OAV provenance check constraint rejects other values
requirement: target_provenance check rejects other values on OAV

name: OAOV provenance check constraint allows created_by_batch
requirement: target_provenance check allows 'created_by_batch' on OAOV

name: OAOV provenance check constraint allows unknown_legacy
requirement: target_provenance check allows 'unknown_legacy' on OAOV

name: OAOV provenance check constraint rejects other values
requirement: target_provenance check rejects other values on OAOV

name: Rollback attempts table exists
requirement: migration_rollback_attempts table exists in public schema

name: Rollback attempts FK is RESTRICT
requirement: migration_rollback_attempts batch_id FK is RESTRICT

name: Rollback attempts unique constraint
requirement: migration_rollback_attempts has unique constraint on batch_id and attempt_number

name: Rollback attempts attempt_number positive constraint
requirement: attempt_number must be positive

name: Rollback attempts deleted count non-negative constraint
requirement: targets_deleted_count must be non-negative

name: Rollback attempts skipped count non-negative constraint
requirement: targets_skipped_count must be non-negative

name: Rollback attempts conflict count non-negative constraint
requirement: targets_conflict_count must be non-negative

name: Rollback attempts status check constraint
requirement: status check allows only running, succeeded, failed, conflict

name: Rollback attempts lifecycle check constraint for running state
requirement: lifecycle check constraint for running state

name: Rollback attempts lifecycle check constraint for succeeded state
requirement: lifecycle check constraint for succeeded state

name: Canonical v2 text formatting check
requirement: Text formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 integer number formatting check
requirement: Integer number formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 decimal number formatting check
requirement: Decimal number formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 boolean true formatting check
requirement: Boolean true formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 boolean false formatting check
requirement: Boolean false formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 year formatting check
requirement: Year formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 enum formatting check
requirement: Enum formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 multi_enum sorted array formatting check
requirement: Multi_enum sorted array formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 date with Z offset check
requirement: Date with Z offset formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 date with positive offset check
requirement: Date with positive offset formats correctly

name: Canonical v2 date with negative offset check
requirement: Date with negative offset formats correctly

name: Offset-free date value rejection check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects offset-free date values

name: Date parsing TimeZone independence check
requirement: process_source_entry date parsing is TimeZone independent

name: Multi_enum null options check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects multi_enum null options

name: Multi_enum duplicate options check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects multi_enum duplicate options

name: OAV text insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV text value successfully

name: OAV number insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV number value successfully

name: OAV boolean insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV boolean value successfully

name: OAV year insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV year value successfully

name: OAV enum insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV enum value successfully

name: OAV date insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAV date value successfully

name: OAV manifest creation check
requirement: process_source_entry creates OAV manifest with correct attributes

name: OAV target_provenance set check
requirement: process_source_entry writes OAV target_provenance as created_by_batch

name: OAV exact text skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact text value exists

name: OAV exact number skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact number value exists

name: OAV exact boolean skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact boolean value exists

name: OAV exact year skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact year value exists

name: OAV exact enum skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact enum value exists

name: OAV exact date skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact date value exists

name: OAV text value mismatch check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on text value mismatch

name: OAV number value mismatch check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on number value mismatch

name: OAV date value mismatch check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on date value mismatch

name: Legacy v1 source entries prohibition check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects legacy v1 source entries with manual_review_required

name: OAOV multi_enum set insert check
requirement: process_source_entry inserts new OAOV multi_enum set successfully

name: OAOV approved option sorting check
requirement: process_source_entry sorts approved option IDs internally before insert

name: OAOV duplicate approved options check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects duplicate approved option IDs

name: OAOV NULL approved option check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects NULL approved option ID

name: OAOV inactive option check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects inactive option IDs

name: OAOV wrong attribute option check
requirement: process_source_entry rejects option ID belonging to another attribute

name: OAOV exact set match skip check
requirement: process_source_entry skips execution when exact OAOV set matches

name: OAOV target manifest reuse check
requirement: process_source_entry does not create target manifest on exact reuse match

name: OAOV partial option set overlap check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on partial option set overlap

name: OAOV extra option set elements check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on extra option set elements

name: OAOV different option set check
requirement: process_source_entry returns manual_review_required on different option set

name: OAOV partial insert check
requirement: process_source_entry performs zero partial inserts on OAOV validation failure

name: OAOV manifest creation count check
requirement: process_source_entry creates manifest per inserted option value

name: OAOV group hash check
requirement: process_source_entry creates OAOV manifests with common canonical group hash

name: OAOV expected target count check
requirement: process_source_entry asserts expected target count matches options cardinality

name: OAOV repeated processing idempotency check
requirement: process_source_entry is idempotent on repeated processing

name: OAOV input-order independence check
requirement: process_source_entry is input-order independent

name: OAOV deterministic set reconstruction check
requirement: process_source_entry reconstructs sorted sets deterministically

name: Rollback OAV text target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV text target successfully

name: Rollback OAV number target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV number target successfully

name: Rollback OAV boolean target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV boolean target successfully

name: Rollback OAV year target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV year target successfully

name: Rollback OAV enum target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV enum target successfully

name: Rollback OAV date target successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes physical OAV date target successfully

name: Rollback whole-group OAOV successfully
requirement: rollback_batch deletes whole-group OAOV multi_enum targets successfully

name: No single-manifest multi-enum rollback
requirement: rollback_batch does not perform single-manifest multi-enum rollback

name: Rollback unknown_legacy blocked check
requirement: rollback_batch blocks rollback of unknown_legacy provenance targets

name: Rollback legacy v1 manifest blocked check
requirement: rollback_batch blocks rollback of legacy v1 manifest targets

name: Rollback OAV target_row_id_current mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict when OAV target_row_id_current mismatch

name: Rollback OAV target_row_id_original mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict when OAV target_row_id_original mismatch

name: Rollback physical target offer mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict on physical target offer mismatch

name: Rollback physical target attribute mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict on physical target attribute mismatch

name: Rollback physical target option mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict on physical target option mismatch

name: Rollback physical target canonical hash mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict on physical target canonical hash mismatch

name: Rollback target provenance ownership mismatch conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict when manifest target_provenance is not 'created_by_batch'

name: Source-entry batch ownership composite FK rejection
requirement: Composite FK on migration_oav_targets rejects manifest with source_entry_id belonging to different batch

name: Rollback non-pending target lifecycle conflict
requirement: rollback_batch returns conflict on non-pending target lifecycle status

name: Rollback manifest update count check
requirement: rollback_batch verifies exact manifest update count during execution

name: Rollback physical delete count check
requirement: rollback_batch verifies exact physical delete count during execution

name: Rollback attempt status succeeded check
requirement: rollback_batch updates rollback attempt status to succeeded on success

name: Rollback attempt status conflict check
requirement: rollback_batch updates rollback attempt status to conflict on semantic mismatch

name: Rollback real technical failure via trigger injection
requirement: rollback_batch returns failed when physical delete is blocked by a database trigger, creating a real attempt record

name: Rollback GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS from real failure
requirement: rollback_batch captures message, detail, hint, and sqlstate from real exception via GET STACKED DIAGNOSTICS

name: Concurrency Scenario A: Session A holds offer lock
requirement: Session A starts transaction and locks target offer

name: Concurrency Scenario A: Session B waits on Locked Offer
requirement: Session B process_source_entry waits on Locked Offer

name: Concurrency Scenario A: Rollback release lock check
requirement: Rollback releases lock and finishes successfully

name: Concurrency Scenario A: Session B resumes and process_source_entry finishes
requirement: Session B resumes and process_source_entry finishes with no duplicate target

name: Concurrency Scenario B: Separate connection channels
requirement: Two sessions establish separate connection channels

name: Concurrency Scenario B: Session B waits for Session A
requirement: Session B waits for Session A to release the lock

name: Concurrency Scenario B: Single target row insert
requirement: Concurrent OAV insert results in exactly one target row

name: Concurrency Scenario B: Manifest count validation
requirement: Manifest count matches expected inserted target count

name: Dry-run execution zero exit code on valid manifest
requirement: Dry-run script is executable with zero exit code on valid manifest

name: Dry-run non-zero exit code on invalid paths
requirement: Dry-run script returns non-zero exit code on invalid file paths

name: Dry-run report contract version check
requirement: Dry-run report output contains correct fixture contract version

name: Dry-run report manifest version check
requirement: Dry-run report output contains correct manifest version

name: Dry-run report offer count
requirement: Dry-run report output contains exact count of 9 offers

name: Dry-run report category count
requirement: Dry-run report output contains exact count of 6 categories

name: Dry-run report unique keys count
requirement: Dry-run report output contains exact count of 23 unique source keys

name: Dry-run report manual review count
requirement: Dry-run report output contains exact count of 23 manual review decisions

name: Git clean working tree check
requirement: git status shows clean working tree (excluding dry-run scripts/reports)

name: Commit contains DDL migrations check
requirement: HEAD commit contains required Sprint 46 DDL migrations

name: HEAD is descendant of Sprint 45 check
requirement: HEAD is a descendant of Sprint 45 baseline commit

name: Drizzle-kit check pass
requirement: npx drizzle-kit check passes successfully

name: TypeScript project compilation check
requirement: Next.js build compiles successfully

name: Git diff check pass
requirement: git diff check passes with no formatting/whitespace checks on tracked code

name: Sprint 44 test suite pass
requirement: verify-lm-cat-filter-44-close.ps1 runs and passes completely

name: Sprint 45 test suite pass
requirement: verify-lm-cat-filter-45.ps1 runs and passes completely
